item.title: Exclusive: U.S. dismissed Ukraine deal for anti-Iran drone tech last year

item.title: More CEOs envision hiring than firing due to AI, survey finds
item.description: Fewer than 1 in 10 CEOs of large U.S. companies plan to cut jobs due to AI in 2026, according to a new survey from consultancy KPMG. Why it matters: T...

item.title: Why oil price spikes (probably) won't spur shift away from oil
item.description: Oil prices would need to stay high for years — not weeks or months — to drive a lasting shift away from the fossil fuel. The big picture: Every time o...

item.title: A world at war: The Iran conflict goes global
